introSection: Nitro is a steel roller coaster located at Dennlys Parc in Dennebroeucq, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: It was announced via the park's official blog on 22 December 2009. It was announced to close in 2022. But it would end up never closing.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Nitro is a möbius roller coaster from Preston & Barbieri, similar to Master Thai at Mirabilandia.

fullText:
Nitro is a steel roller coaster located at Dennlys Parc in Dennebroeucq, Hauts-de-France, France.

It was announced via the park's official blog on 22 December 2009. It was announced to close in 2022. But it would end up never closing.

Nitro is a möbius roller coaster from Preston & Barbieri, similar to Master Thai at Mirabilandia.
